base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hammer_mario — a character (playable) from 1988 super mario bros 3. Hammer Mario (Hammer Suit) — hammer-throw (Hammer Bro ability) + duck-invincibility. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Hammer Mario (Hammer Suit) — hammer-throw (Hammer Bro ability) + duck-invincibility
